---
title: "Welcome"
output: html_document
---

##     Victoria Li

Home:                              Tel: (647)-517-2938                              Thornhill, Ontario L4J7V3          Email: v42li@uwaterloo.ca

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Summary of Qualifications
+ Experienced in C# and Java by producing games using graphic user interface, receiving a grade of A+
+ Familiarity with tools such as Eclipse, Visual Studio Code and automation
+ Currently learning C++ in a data structures and algorithms course
+ Impressive leadership, communication and initiative skills in team projects by
achieving top 10 internationally in the integrated marketing campaign event

### Awards
+ Student Council Award (2019)
  Demonstrated leadership and initiative within the school community
+ DECA (Distributive Executive Clubs of America) Internationals Top 10 (2019)
+ Gold championship volleyball medal - Ontario Volleyball Association (2015)
